HGSS.369.0000:
People usually come to my house
looking for Mr. Pokémon’s house.\r
You did mean to visit my house, right?\f
How kind of you!
Do you...have any Apricorns?\r
Apricorn trees bear fruit once a day.\r
I have one of those trees, too!\f
Apricorns are really something.
You can make Poké Balls and\r
other things.\f
They are quite useful.\f
I have a feeling this is meant to be.
I’m so happy that I’ll give you this!\f
HGSS.369.0002:
With that Apricorn Box, you can carry
so many Apricorns.\r
You’ll be a decent Apricorn collector!
HGSS.369.0003:
Hey, collector of Apricorns!\f
Have you noticed that Apricorn colors
are different from tree to tree?\f
Try to remember what color Apricorn
you get from each tree!
